name: Lasagna
recipeIngredient: 1 lb frozen chopped spinach (or preferably fresh chopped equivalent)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the tomatoesauce, tomato paste, water (or wine), and spaghetti sauce in a large pot. Bring to a boil on the stove and set aside.
2. In a bowl, combine the ricotta, spinach, and egg whites.
3. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
4. Spread about 1 cup of the tomato mixture in the bottom of a 9x14 inch baking pan.
5. Place a layer of dry lasagne noodles over the sauce.
6. Add half of the cheese/spinach mixture, followed by half of the non-fat mozzarella, and then half of the remaining sauce.
6. Top with another layer of dry lasagne noodles.
7. Repeat steps 4-6 until all ingredients are used up and the pan is filled.
8. Cover the pan with tin foil and bake for 50 minutes.
9. Remove the foil and continue baking for an additional 10 minutes.
10. Let the lasagna rest for 10 minutes before serving.
